productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style NoteFor the non-conformist high-fashion male, this pair of shoes from Red Tape is the right choice. Styled in genuine, soft leather for optimal comfort, this pair does not compromise on its style quotient. Wear them with your work wear formals. You'll create a great impression in the office if you pair them up with a slim Fit shirt, flat front trousers - and don't forget to match your belt with your shoes.Product DetailsBrown slip-on with stitched detailing, overlays and elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongueThick rubber midsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured grooves and stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
